features: Radiantly beautiful skin is not only something for special occasions.
With a luxurious combination of moisturising elements and special nutrients.
This silky body cream from Dove gives you an unforgettable feeling.
Your skin feels silky-smooth and looks radiantly beautiful.
description: Dove Silky Care Range Silky stands for delicate, smooth skin, shiny hair, beauty and luxury. And that's exactly what women want. This wish can be fulfilled: with the silky care range from Dove! All products of body cleansing and care pamper with the proven 1/4 moisturising cream and a pleasantly subtle fragrance. Dove Silky Moisturiser Body Cream Radiantly beautiful skin is not just something for special occasions - you can show it every day. With a luxurious combination of moisturisers and special care ingredients, the Dove Silky Body Cream gives an unforgettable feeling. Your skin feels silky soft and looks radiantly beautiful
